payload.hypothesis: Try a tiny hard-flip neural BP predecoder with shared weights and 3 unrolled iterations to stay inside the latency budget and test whether a message-passing family beats the compact soft-prior GNN.
payload.rationale: The only prior branch, exp/20260424-154450/01-try-a-compact-3-layer-gated-mlp-gnn-with, came in at zero delta_vs_baseline and exceeded the param budget, so I would not iterate on that soft-prior GNN shape. Starting from baseline with a smaller neural-BP hard_flip design is the cheapest meaningful change that also respects the latency and parameter constraints.
